title: combo of Main & Sharable board permissions
excerpt: By default all our company monday boards are Main boards, so everyone can access if needed. Some of the projects tracked in monday involve collaboration with people outside our company. If I want to share the monday boar…

posts.author: ingridbee (Ingrid Berendt)
posts.cookedHtml:
By default all our company monday boards are Main boards, so everyone can access if needed. Some of the projects tracked in monday involve collaboration with people outside our company. If I want to share the monday board with outsiders, I need to change it to a Sharble board. What is frustrating is that now I also need to give explicit permission to people at my company to access the board, because I made it Shareable, to accommodate the outsider access.

I would like the ability to keep a board accessible to everyone in my company (Main board) and then add outside users and alo allow them access (Shareable board).

posts.author: Charay (Chris Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes!!! This should be the default. Just bc you’re collaborating with external stakeholders, Monday shouldn’t assume we don’t want our internal stakeholders to have access. Is this being considered?
